“敬华夏！”"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1717725168,"group_id":"7305008165320395795","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N6AoFddS8tVr/LcuY0pAK7I=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"541432030966095","user_name":"风扇嗡嗡吹"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"541432030966095","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7305008165320395795","book_info":{"abstract":"【末世+基建+系统＋大女主爽文＋西幻】
穿越到寒冷的冰河末世，还被迫成为了领主，面对空旷的领地，稀少的领民，乔念一脸懵逼。
流浪者、掠夺者、野人，小小的森林里危机四伏。
看着满脸期待的领民们，乔念深吸一口气。
要想富！多种树！松树、桦树、枫糖树！
要想富！多修路！土路、石路、水泥路！
好不容易度过了血月之夜，乔念正准备带着领民奔小康，没想到活在背景板里的神突然派人来摘果子。
乔念冷笑，是时候让这个世界的神看一看什么叫做降维打击了。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/392db859af95b8aeaf8030b7a9d04cce~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"兔子糖","author_id":"","book_id":"7305008165320395795","book_name":"开局天灾，我在异世搞基建","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#300000","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{"category_id":23,"name":"种田","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=23&name=种田&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":5,"name":"古代言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=5&name=古代言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":68,"name":"末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=68&name=末世&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":658,"name":"天灾","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=658&name=天灾&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":828,"name":"基建","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=828&name=基建&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7306032544644860967","read_count":"169","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"181795"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"86","tags":"种田,古代言情,系统,穿越,末世,天灾,基建","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/392db859af95b8aeaf8030b7a9d04cce~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779436436&x-signature=yvK7jJkJD0ipqzsB70Zr1Bjsw8I%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"95"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032315535659630993F0C570C1E683"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_coun
